## Summary

(One short paragraph: what changed and why.)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding capability)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing API changes)
- [ ] Documentation only (roxygen, vignettes, README, NEWS, pkgdown)
- [ ] Internal (refactor, tests, CI, no user-visible change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `devtools::document()` runs cleanly.
- [ ] `devtools::check()` passes locally.
- [ ] `NEWS.md` updated for any user-visible change.
- [ ] Documentation rebuilt where roxygen or vignettes changed.
- [ ] Cross-references to related issues / discussions linked below.

## Related issues

Closes #
Refs #

## Notes for the reviewer

(Anything that is not obvious from the diff: design decisions taken,
alternatives considered, follow-ups deferred.)
